scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); for (const f of ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock']) { try { fs.unlinkSync(f); } catch (e) { if (e.code !== 'ENOENT') throw e; } } const ua = process.env.npm_config_user_agent || ''; if (!ua.startsWith('pnpm/')) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.dev: cross-env PORT=18869 BASE_PATH=/ pnpm --filter @workspace/project-hub run dev
scripts.dev:api: cross-env PORT=8080 NODE_ENV=development pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
